response.overview: Forever 27 tells the story of Kit Cordell, a rockstar from 1988 who becomes trapped inside one of music’s darkest legends. The myth began with Sister Blister, one of the first performers to die at 27. An unhinged musician who carried out occult rituals deep inside the Hellfire Caves.  For decades, artists who reached the age of 27 have been mysteriously drawn back to those caves and none have escaped their fate.
response.tagline: They say anyone who watches it starts dreaming about the 27 Club. Don’t say I didn’t warn you.
response.title: Forever 27
